qa_pairs.question: How do you ensure Ansys Fluent updates Discrete Phase Model (DPM) source terms every flow iteration, and how can this setting be automated in a journal file?
qa_pairs.answer: To enable Ansys Fluent to update Discrete Phase Model (DPM) source terms every flow iteration, you need to open the Discrete Phase Model Dialog Box and select 'Interaction with Continuous Phase'. This setting can either be saved in your '.cas' file or added to your journal file after solution initialization using the command `/define/models/dpm/interaction/coupled-calculations yes`.

qa_pairs.question: What are some example journal file commands for automating Discrete Phase Model (DPM) injection after solution initialization in Ansys Fluent?
qa_pairs.answer: After confirming a DPM injection works in the GUI, you can automate it in a journal file with commands such as `/define/models/dpm/interaction/coupled-calculations yes`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/delete-injection injection-0:1`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/create injection-0:1 no yes file no zinjection01.inj no no no no`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/list-particles injection-0:1`, and `/define/models/dpm/injections/list-injection-properties injection-0:1`.
